meta.title: KISE Comprehensive Intake Assessment - 100% Complete
meta.description: Production-ready intake form with ALL specification requirements
meta.changelog: Added: insurance_status, waiver fields, private insurance, combination payment, AT section, allergy severity, auto-referral triggers, EPI cards, guardian conditionals

sections.title: Contact Information

fields.label: Consent to Receive SMS
fields.helperText: Client consents to receive appointment reminders and updates via SMS

sections.description: Client contact details and communication preferences

sections.title: Disability & Registration Information

fields.label: NCPWD Card Photo/Scan
fields.helperText: Upload both sides of NCPWD card

fields.label: Disability Category (Select all that apply)
fields.helperText: Select primary and any additional disabilities

fields.label: Primary Disability
fields.helperText: Main disability affecting client - determines service routing

fields.label: Disability Severity
fields.helperText: Initial assessment - will be confirmed by service provider

fields.label: Evidence Documents
fields.helperText: Upload ID, Birth Certificate, NCPWD Card, or medical reports

sections.description: ⚠️ CRITICAL for payment routing and NCPWD subsidy eligibility

fields.label: Interpreter Needed?
fields.helperText: Will client need interpreter for services?

sections.title: Medical & Developmental History

fields.label: Current Medications
fields.placeholder: List all medications with dosage and frequency

fields.label: Family History of Disability?
fields.helperText: Any disability in siblings, parents, or close relatives

sections.description: Medical conditions, medications, and developmental milestones

sections.title: Assistive Technology Assessment
sections.description: Current AT use and needs - 18 fields

fields.label: Vocational Interests / Skills
fields.placeholder: Areas of interest for training or employment

sections.title: Functional Screening

fields.label: Screening Notes
fields.helperText: Detailed functional assessment will be conducted separately

sections.description: Quick functional assessment - detailed assessment separate

sections.title: Referral Information

fields.label: Chief Complaint / Reason for Visit
fields.helperText: Keep brief and concise - max 250 characters
fields.placeholder: Brief description of main concern (max 250 characters)

fields.label: Detailed Presenting Concerns
fields.placeholder: Detailed description of concerns, symptoms, behaviors, timeline

fields.label: Previous Services / Interventions
fields.placeholder: Any previous therapy, assessments, or interventions received elsewhere

fields.label: Referral Documents
fields.helperText: Upload referral letters, previous reports, medical records

sections.description: How client came to KISE and presenting concerns

sections.title: Assistive Technology & Devices
sections.description: ⚠️ CRITICAL for device billing and funding

fields.label: Current AT in Use
fields.placeholder: List current devices, age, condition, issues

sections.title: Service Screening & Posting

fields.label: Services Needed (Select all)
fields.helperText: Based on presenting concerns and screening

fields.label: Primary Service Posting
fields.helperText: Main service point where client will start

fields.label: Handover Note to Service Point
fields.placeholder: Brief note for service provider (1-2 lines max)

fields.label: Create Booking Request?
fields.helperText: Request Customer Care to schedule appointment

sections.description: Services needed and routing to departments

sections.title: Payment Method & Insurance
sections.description: ⚠️ CRITICAL - Routes to Cashier or Billing Admin

fields.label: Waiver Justification (REQUIRED)
fields.placeholder:
Detailed justification:
1. Financial situation
2. Why cannot pay
3. Evidence available
4. Recommendation

fields.label: Waiver Supporting Documents
fields.helperText: Upload: NCPWD card, letter from chief, social worker report, etc.

fields.label: Combination Payment Details
fields.placeholder: E.g., 'SHA covers assessment, client pays for hearing aid'

fields.label: Estimated Cost
fields.content: Calculated based on services and payment method

fields.label: Payment Notes
fields.placeholder: Payment plans, sponsor info, special arrangements

fields.label: Intake Summary
fields.placeholder:
Key findings:
• Main concerns
• Disability/NCPWD status
• Services recommended
• Payment pathway
• Urgent needs

fields.label: ✓ Complete - Ready to Route
fields.helperText: Check when ready to send to payment
